_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-promptpack. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

subject.description: What to drop into the recipe's {subject} slot.

theme.description: Optional path to a brandkit.json to fold in (on-theme).

recipes.description: Optional custom recipe library JSON path.

out.description: Optional path to write the composed prompt JSON.

function.name: mythosforge_promptpack
function.description: Compose a generator-ready prompt from a curated recipe library, optionally themed with a brandkit token. No API key — pure composition. Returns { recipe, prompt, model, aspect, negative }; feed prompt+model+aspect to a generator like mythosforge-imagegen.

subject.description: What to put into the recipe's {subject} slot.

recipes.description: Optional custom recipe library JSON path.

out.description: Optional path to write the composed prompt JSON.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_promptpack
anthropic.description: Compose a generator-ready prompt from a curated recipe library, optionally themed with a brandkit token. No API key — pure composition. Returns { recipe, prompt, model, aspect, negative }; feed prompt+model+aspect to a generator like mythosforge-imagegen.

subject.description: What to put into the recipe's {subject} slot.

recipes.description: Optional custom recipe library JSON path.

out.description: Optional path to write the composed prompt JSON.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (no key needed):
invocation.returns: JSON: { ok, recipe, prompt, model, aspect, negative }. Feed prompt/model/aspect back to the model, or straight into a generator skill.
